# Chapter 10: Digital electronics, embedded systems  (~140 pp)
- 10.1 Logic families and timing (15) · 10.2 Microcontrollers vs microprocessors vs FPGAs (15) · 10.3 Embedded firmware: real-time considerations (20) · 10.4 Communication buses: I²C, SPI, UART, CAN, USB, Ethernet (20) · 10.5 Power management in embedded (12) · 10.6 PCB design for digital and mixed-signal (18) · 10.7 EMC and certification preview (15) · 10.8 Failure section: brownouts, ESD damage, undocumented errata (25)
